timeline.lowConsensus: Whakaaetanga iti — kei te wehe tonu ngā kaikawe.
timeline.concludedAfter: I whakamutua te kōrerorero i muri i {rounds} raunda{plural} me te tau whakaaetanga {percent}%.

ocr.title: Pūnaha OCR
ocr.available: Kei te wātea te pūnaha OCR
ocr.preferredHint: Kōwhiria te pūnaha OCR hei whakamahi.
ocr.engineAutoHint: PaddleOCR → EasyOCR → Tesseract — ngana ia pūnaha i te raupapa
ocr.enginePaddleHint: Te tika pai, ka tautokona te CUDA
ocr.engineEasyHint: Te tika pai, he pai te GPU
ocr.engineTesseractHint: Māmā, ka wātea tonu hei whakaheke
ocr.reqAuto: Kāore he hiahia motuhake; ka whakamahia te mea e wātea ana.
ocr.reqPaddle: Tāuta: pip install paddlepaddle paddleocr. Tirohia scripts/setup_dms.sh. GPU: NVIDIA GPU me te CUDA + nvidia-docker.
ocr.reqEasy: Tāuta: pip install easyocr. He pai te GPU (PyTorch me te CUDA); ka mahi te CPU engari he pōturi mō ngā tuhinga nui.
ocr.reqTesseract:
Tāuta te pūnaha Tesseract:
  • Debian/Ubuntu: sudo apt install tesseract-ocr tesseract-ocr-deu tesseract-ocr-eng
  • macOS: brew install tesseract
  • Windows: tikiake mai i te GitHub UB-Mannheim/tesseract
